articles.title: Why are oil prices up today, and will Brent and US WTI crude futures rise sharply or fall again? Global oil market reacts to US-Iran tensions. Here's analysts insights and market outlook
articles.description: Why are oil prices up today, and will Brent and US WTI crude futures rise sharply or fall again? Oil prices jumped after the United States and Iran failed to reach a peace proposal and the Strait of Hormuz stayed restricted. Brent crude and US WTI futures climbed over 3%. Drone attacks, nuclear tensions, shipping risks, and supply fears are shaping the oil market outlook. Analysts now track diplomatic talks, military risks, and supply flows to predict future price direction.

articles.title: 14 police officers killed in Pakistan after car bomb destroys outpost, militants launch ambush
Security Scare In Bengaluru Ahead Of PM Modi Visit After Explosives Recovery | Watch
articles.description: A major security scare emerged in Bengaluru ahead of Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s visit after two gelatine sticks were recovered near the event venue during a security check. Police said the explosives were found nearly three kilometres away from the main site, prompting an immediate investigation and heightened surveillance. The development comes amid nationwide security alerts following intelligence inputs regarding a possible terror threat, with authorities increasing vigilance across sensitive locations in Delhi and Bengaluru. Watch

Aerial drone surveys are currently in progress to evaluate the extent of the damage as plans are underway for a provisional Bailey bridge suitable for light traffic.

articles.title: Vivek Oberoi celebrates mother, wife and sister in heartfelt Mother’s Day tribute
articles.description: Actor Vivek Oberoi honored the women who shape future generations this Mother's Day. He lauded his mother for her unwavering strength, his wife Priyanka for nurturing their children, and his sister Meghna for embodying their mother's grace. Oberoi expressed profound gratitude for the women who have influenced his life and are building the next generation with love and resilience.
